case_title: DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FREDA SIMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BUCK BUCEY IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, FREDA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-27-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-28-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-12-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, FREDA $1,908.95 PRINCIPAL, $572.69 ATTORNEY FEES, $318.16 INTEREST, $136.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,936.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON NOV-26-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR.
